examples: We tried to develop plans for them to get along, which all failed miserably.
She began to howl quite horribly, but Gretel ran away and the godless witch was miserably burnt to death.
He failed miserably as an actor.
The few attempts at interface customization, like the toolbar in MS Office, have failed miserably.
Products that miss the sweet spot by arriving too early or too late, often fail miserably.
